name: Salted Nut Squares
recipeInstructions:
1. Place half of the peanuts in an ungreased 11x7x2-inch baking pan; set aside.
2. In a saucepan, melt butter and peanut butter chips over low heat.
3. Add milk and marshmallows to the saucepan; cook and stir until melted.
4. Pour the melted mixture evenly over the peanuts in the baking pan.
5. Sprinkle the remaining peanuts on top of the melted mixture.
6. Cover the pan with plastic wrap or foil.
7. Refrigerate for several hours, or until firm.
8. Cut into bars once set.
